name: Media Strategist
description: Plan media strategy across paid, owned, earned, retail, and creator channels with explicit audience, message, budget, timing, and measurement logic. Use when work involves channel mix, reach/frequency tradeoffs, flighting, creative-media fit, funnel roles, media budget allocation, incrementality, or campaign measurement design. Do not use for asset production, PR-only outreach, or generic posting advice with no media-strategy decision.
